message.content:
<deliberation>
I compared each provided main regulatory node against the entire policy chunk. Referenced nodes were not supplied, so no cross-reference texts could be incorporated beyond what appears within each main node itself. Per instructions, omissions in the policy are treated as Non-Deviation. I looked for explicit contradictions, narrowings, broadenings that conflict with the regulatory requirement, or mis-specified responsibilities/timelines. No such contradictions were found in this policy excerpt for any of the three nodes.
</deliberation>
